# TerraGuard

> AI co-pilot for vineyard management. TerraGuard uses drones and computer vision to monitor vineyards, detect crop anomalies early, and deliver actionable insights to vineyard managers via an AI assistant.

TerraGuard is an early-stage AgriTech startup based in Georgia (country). It addresses a core challenge in viticulture: vineyard problems often become visible only after damage has occurred. TerraGuard enables continuous, large-area monitoring so growers can act before losses happen.

## How It Works

Drones scan vineyards and collect aerial imagery and sensor data. This data is processed to evaluate crop health and field conditions. TerraGuard's AI assistant analyzes the signals, detects risks and anomalies, and presents growers with clear, decision-ready insights.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.terraguard.ge/): Product overview, how it works, pilot program details.

## Pilot Program

TerraGuard is running a limited free pilot with select vineyards to validate the product in real field conditions. Pilot spots are limited and currently free of charge.

- Apply: https://www.terraguard.ge/#pilot

## Company

- Founded: Georgia (Tbilisi)
- Stage: MVP / early traction
- Accelerators: Startupbootcamp Georgia MVP Program (selected from 650+ applicants), GIST Accelerator
- Contact: info@terraguard.ge | +995 598 40 33 98

## Topics This Site Covers

Vineyard monitoring, precision viticulture, drone-based crop scanning, agricultural AI, anomaly detection, plant health assessment, AgriTech, Georgia wine industry.
